content.full_text:
WG
& S
WEINTRAUB
GENSHLEA
& SPROUL
LAW CORPORATION

March 31, 1992

Malcolm S. Weintraub
Joseph S. Genshlea
Curtis C. Sproul
Geoffrey Burroughs
I. Bardin Gilbert
Kenneth M. Malonus
Michael I. Dillard
Dee Hantzog
Kenneth J. Syba
Dale C. Campbell
Christopher Chediak
Harold J. Rhizard
R. Todd Lucena
Karen I. Boon
Gary I. Brodie
Phillip I. Campbell
Pegge A Christiaunsen
Edward I. Cope, Jr.
Steven I. Eggen
Michael R. German
Matthew J. Goldman
Kevin B. Iune
Joan A Jernegun
Rosemary I. Kelley
Robin I. Klomparens
Marcus J. La Duca
Kevin G. Long
Steven I. Mair
Audrey A Milliemann
Thomas M. Monnes
P. Tsuhokawa Reeves
Dean R. Stein
Thomas G. Trost
David W. Tyra
Alan R. Van Stralen
Michael I. Vergara

Legal Division
Attn: Scott Hallabrin
Accounting General Counsel
428 Jst, Suite #800
Sacramento, CA. 95814


Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

This letter is to request written verification of the
Fair Political Practices policy regarding political
contributions. The minimum and the maximum that can
be contributed for a given period of time.. In addition,
if as a lobbying Firm we must report State, County, or
City contributions.

Thank you in advance for your cooperation.

Sincerely,

Kimberly O. Camp
Kimberly O. Camp
Accounting Dept.


400 Capitol Mall
Eleventh Floor
Sacramento, CA 95814
FAX 916 446 1611
916 558 6000

Mailing Address
P.O. Box 15208
Sacramento, CA
95851-0208
